channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Potential Economic Impacts of a Prolonged US-Iran Conflict
item.description: Due to the current access restrictions on the Sky News website, the full content of the article could not be retrieved. Based on the title, the article likely discusses the potential economic conseque...

item.title: Concerns Rise Over Xenophobic Tensions Against African Migrants in South Africa
item.description: Fresh fears of xenophobic violence don burst again for South Africa, and e dey put lives of many Nigerians, Ghanaians and other African migrants for danger. Viral videos wey dey show South Africans de...

item.title: Microsoft and Meta announce significant workforce reductions amid cost-cutting efforts
item.description: Microsoft and Meta are reportedly planning to cut thousands of jobs as part of broader cost-reduction and restructuring strategies. These layoffs reflect ongoing adjustments across the technology sect...

item.title: Review: ABC’s Bad Company struggles to find fresh humour in theatre workplace setting
item.description: Bad Company, the ABC’s new workplace comedy created by Anne Edmonds, aims to explore the tension between creativity and financial pragmatism in a theatre setting. The series opens with Edmonds’ charac...

item.title: Man Uses Hot Coffee to Protect Himself During Robbery
item.description: In Tuguegarao City, Cagayan, a local man reportedly defended himself from a robbery attempt by using his hot coffee as a weapon. According to reports, the suspect tried to snatch valuables from the vi...

item.title: Horoscope Guidance for April 24, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail provides daily astrological insights for April 24, 2026. Individuals with birthdays today, particularly Taurus, are encouraged to embrace generosity and enjoy life's pleasures. Arie...

item.title: Travel experts reassure Scots despite rising jet fuel costs and airline schedule changes
item.description: Scottish holidaymakers have expressed concern over potential disruptions and increased costs as airlines worldwide respond to soaring jet fuel prices by introducing surcharges, raising ticket prices, ...

item.title: Warner Bros Shareholders Vote to Approve Paramount Acquisition Amid Regulatory Review
item.description: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders have overwhelmingly approved Paramount Skydance's $81 billion takeover offer, moving the merger closer to completion. The deal, which values the company at nearly $...

item.title: US Special Forces Soldier Charged for Using Classified Information to Gamble on Venezuelan Operation
item.description: A US special forces operative, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, who was involved in the January operation to capture Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, has been formally charged for exploiting classified inform...

item.title: US Trade Representative Describes India as a Challenging Market for Agricultural Trade
item.description: During a recent congressional hearing in Washington, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer described India as a challenging market for agricultural trade, emphasising that it has protected its agricu...

item.title: Son of former police officer booked after alleged shooting of FBR inspector in Clifton
item.description: A serious firing incident took place in Karachi’s Clifton area where an official of the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR), identified as Inspector Shah Mir Lashari, was allegedly shot and injured followi...

item.title: Storm Halts Trial of Man Accused of Killing 4 Toddlers in Ggaba Daycare Incident
item.description: A violent storm disrupted the trial of Christopher Okello Onyum, who stands accused of killing four toddlers in a daycare centre in Ggaba. The storm, which struck Kampala during court proceedings, for...

item.title: Hilary Duff reflects on child stardom and her own positive experience
item.description: Hilary Duff shared her thoughts on growing up in the entertainment industry, reflecting on the recent documentaries that explore the challenges faced by child stars. She mentioned that films like Fram...

item.title: Peguis First Nation completes flood preparations ahead of expected Fisher River surge
item.description: Peguis First Nation in Manitoba has finalised most of its flood preparations as the community monitors rising waters from the Fisher River. The First Nation, located in the Interlake region, has spent...

item.title: Punjab police takes radical preacher Amritpal Singh into two-day custody in Assam
item.description: The Punjab police have taken radical preacher Amritpal Singh into a two-day custody in Assam as part of ongoing investigations into his activities. Singh, who has been in the news for his controversia...

item.title: UK Universities Include Defense Companies on Academic Advisory Committees
item.description: An investigation by Declassified UK reveals that major defense contractors, including BAE Systems, Leonardo, Thales, and Rolls-Royce, have been granted roles on advisory committees within at least 21 ...

item.title: Domestic workers in Karnataka continue to remain outside formal labour protections
item.description: The article highlights the continued lack of formal recognition and protection for domestic workers in Karnataka, despite recent policy efforts. It focuses on the lived reality of workers like Vijayal...

item.title: Sjika Da Thirdborn nominated for Savanna Newcomer Award, aims to grow vernacular comedy
item.description: Jabulani Moshoeshoe, popularly known as Sjika Da Thirdborn, is making waves in South Africa's comedy scene with his unique vernacular style. Born in Katlehong, Moshoeshoe began his comedy journey in 2...

item.title: DOJ confirms Zaldy Co remains under Czech legal jurisdiction
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has clarified that Zaldy Co, a figure involved in legal controversies, remains under the jurisdiction of authorities in the Czech Republic. According to the DOJ, ongoin...

item.title: Fernando Mendoza Shares Emotional Moment with His Family After Being Selected First Overall in the 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: Fernando Mendoza, the Indiana Hoosiers quarterback, was selected as the No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 NFL Draft by the Las Vegas Raiders. However, instead of attending the event in Pittsburgh, he cho...
